Handles accessory modes, imaging, and manufacturing operations with state management and input handling.


## Files
- **[accessory_idle_mode.c](accessory_idle_mode.c.md)**: Handles character input to detect a platform-specific knocking code and trigger manufacturing mode.
- **[accessory_idle_mode.h](accessory_idle_mode.h.md)**: Handles a character input to determine accessory idle mode status.
- **[accessory_imaging.c](accessory_imaging.c.md)**: Implements accessory imaging functionality, including flash operations and communication handling.
- **[accessory_imaging.h](accessory_imaging.h.md)**: Functions for handling character input and enabling accessory imaging.
- **[accessory_manager.c](accessory_manager.c.md)**: Manages accessory state transitions and input handling for different accessory modes.
- **[accessory_manager.h](accessory_manager.h.md)**: Manages accessory input states with initialization and state-setting functions.
- **[accessory_mfg_mode.c](accessory_mfg_mode.c.md)**: Implements accessory manufacturing mode with command handling and prompt display for Pebble firmware.
- **[accessory_mfg_mode.h](accessory_mfg_mode.h.md)**: Functions for starting and handling operations in accessory manufacturing mode.
